name: pip-audit (Python Dependency Vulnerability Scanner)

auth.notes: Queries PyPI JSON API and OSV database; no auth needed

performance.notes: Network-dependent; queries PyPI/OSV for each package

agent_readiness.notes: Checks Python dependencies for known vulnerabilities. pip-audit. pip-audit --requirement requirements.txt. pip-audit -r requirements.txt --fix (auto-updates). JSON output: pip-audit --format json. Queries PyPI's advisory database + OSV (GitHub Advisory). Works with pip, pipenv, poetry (via --require-hashes). GitHub Actions native integration. Part of PyPA tooling. Alternative to Safety CLI. Free, no API key required.

gotchas: Only finds vulnerabilities with public CVEs/advisories
Does not scan source code (pair with Bandit for SAST)
Network required for advisory database lookup
best_when: Python CI/CD pipeline dependency vulnerability scanning
GitHub Actions security workflow for Python repos
Automated dependency security checks without an API key
avoid_when: Need code security scanning (use Bandit or Semgrep)
summary: pip-audit scans Python dependencies for known CVE vulnerabilities. pip-audit -r requirements.txt. Queries PyPI advisory DB + OSV (GitHub Advisory). JSON output for CI. --fix to auto-upgrade. No API key required. Official PyPA tool. Pairs with Bandit for complete Python security: pip-audit (dependencies) + Bandit (code). Alternative to Safety CLI.
